summary: Comprehensive testing of DROPSHOT tennis video analytics app completed. Backend APIs are functional with 11/14 tests passing. Frontend UI is working excellently with proper navigation, responsive design, and real analytics data display.

minor_issues.issue: JSON parsing error when testing video streams (expected behavior - returns video data, not JSON)
minor_issues.impact: No functional impact - endpoints work correctly

minor_issues.issue: Rate limiting not triggered in test scenario
minor_issues.impact: Unable to verify rate limiting functionality

passed_tests: GET /api/ returns app info
GET /api/health returns healthy status with db, storage, active_jobs
POST /api/upload accepts video file and returns analysis ID
POST /api/upload rejects non-video files with 400 error
GET /api/analyses returns paginated list with 4 existing analyses
GET /api/analyses?page=1&limit=5 pagination works correctly
GET /api/analyses/{id} returns analysis details for valid ID
GET /api/analyses/{id} returns 404 for invalid ID
GET /api/analyses/{id}/original-video streams original video
GET /api/analyses/{id}/output-video streams H.264 video
POST /api/analyses/{id}/retry handles retry requests
Homepage loads with DROPSHOT branding and upload zone
Upload zone shows drag-and-drop area with proper styling
History page loads with 4 existing analyses
Dashboard page shows all tabs: overview, shots, tracking, video
Video tab shows both original and analyzed video players
Dashboard shows real analytics data (not placeholder)
Navigation between Upload and History works perfectly
Responsive design works on desktop, tablet, and mobile
Download functionality is available and enabled
